HGSS.067.0000:
Ahem, do you hear me?\f
...I am the Director.\f
We have decided to broadcast wonderful
shows to praise Team Rocket!\f
Everyone, I don’t want to hear you
complain. Just do a good job to...\f
HGSS.067.0001:
Yikes!
I am busy impersonating the...\r
Who are you?\f
HGSS.067.0003:
Petrel: No, no, no! I was pretending to
be the Director to influence the entire\r
region to support Team Rocket!\f
This time I won’t hold back!
Give me all you’ve got!\f
HGSS.067.0004:
Petrel: Listen carefully.\f
We stashed the real Director in the
underground warehouse.\f
It’s at the far end of the
Goldenrod Tunnel.\f
I am a nice guy. I will give you the
Basement Key to get to the\r
underground warehouse.\r
Take it with gratitude!\f
HGSS.067.0005:
Petrel: We stashed the Director in the
underground warehouse.\f
It’s at the far end of the
Goldenrod Tunnel.\f
Hahaha...
I doubt a child like you’ll get that far.
HGSS.067.0006:
Director: Hello, it is you! You know,
I really love Pokémon.\f
I built this Radio Tower just so I could
express my love of Pokémon.\f
It would be nice if people enjoyed our
programs.
